task_completion.visual_evidence: Wireshark GUI showing the http.cap file loaded, or a terminal window showing a tshark command reading the file.

task_completion.description: Extract HTTP objects from the capture
task_completion.visual_evidence: Wireshark 'HTTP object list' window visible (accessed via File -> Export Objects -> HTTP), or a terminal showing a tshark command with the --export-objects flag.

task_completion.description: Save the extracted objects to the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal showing the extracted files saved in the /home/ga/Documents/extracted_objects/ directory.
A text editor (like gedit, nano, or vim) or terminal showing the creation or editing of the file /home/ga/Documents/http_extraction_report.txt.

task_completion.description: Include the total number of extracted files in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report text explicitly states that 2 files were extracted.

task_completion.description: Include the filenames of the extracted objects in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report text lists the filenames 'download.html' and the long 'ads...' file.

task_completion.description: Include the hostnames for each extracted file in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report text lists the hostnames 'www.ethereal.com' and 'pagead2.googlesyndication.com' corresponding to the files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used appropriate tools to extract the data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with Wireshark or tshark to find the information, rather than just writing the report from prior knowledge.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the exact directories specified
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent saves files directly to /home/ga/Documents/extracted_objects/ and /home/ga/Documents/http_extraction_report.txt without using unexpected shortcuts.

integrity.description: Verify the report was genuinely created by the agent
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is typed or generated by the agent based on the extracted data, not copied from a pre-existing solution file or external source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The PCAP file contains exactly 2 HTTP objects. File 1: 'download.html' from hostname 'www.ethereal.com'. File 2: 'ads%3fclient=ca-pub-2309191948673629&random=1084443430285&lmt=1082467020&format=468x60_as&output=html&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.ethereal.com%2Fdownload.html&color_bg=FFFFFF&color_text=333333&color_link=000000&color_url=666633&color_border=666633' from hostname 'pagead2.googlesyndication.com'. The report must be saved at /home/ga/Documents/http_extraction_report.txt and objects extracted to /home/ga/Documents/extracted_objects/.
